title: Fix dashboard approval TUI action discoverability
description: Dashboard approval actions warned even when users pressed a from the list and global awaiting ticks were not selectable. Add a synthetic Human attention record, show a/x help, and make list a/x open detail first for review.
acceptance_criteria: Awaiting smoke tick appears in dashboard; a/x visible from detail; list a/x opens detail for review; go test ./... passes
closed_reason: Implemented Human attention record, detail-visible a/x help, list-to-detail guard, and smoke tick; go test ./... passes
